mustHaves.summary: jot add appends a timestamped note locally
jot list --since prints a date range

notes: authn/authz/secrets/perf-envelope/abuse-surface all excluded: single-user, no network surface, no accounts, no credentials. external-integrations still REQUIRED TO DECIDE — the correct decision is 'none' (status: excluded with reason), not silence. observability optional (single-user, not production) and would be decided 'excluded'. data-lifecycle optional: local notes, no privacy/PII constraint elevating it. error-handling required always (file-store write failures).
